title: Sound of Stillness
description: Record the natural soundscape for 60 seconds. Focus on layers — water, wind, birds, distant sounds.

title: Forest Floor Listening
description: Sit still and record 60 seconds of the forest. Count how many distinct sounds you can identify afterward.

title: Voice of the Wind
description: At an open high point, record the wind for 45 seconds. Notice how it changes pitch with the terrain.

title: Echo Mapping
description: Near the cave mouth, record a soft clap and its echo. Listen to how the space answers you.

title: Sketch the Flow
description: Find a spot by the water and sketch how the stream moves around obstacles.

title: Canopy Windows
description: Look up. Sketch the shapes of sky visible between the branches.

title: Horizon Lines
description: From the summit, sketch only the horizon line — every ridge, every dip, one continuous stroke.

title: Light & Shadow Capture
description: Photograph the same scene in direct light and in shade. Notice what changes between the two.

title: Texture Study
description: Choose one surface — bark, rock, moss — and sketch only its texture, no outline.

title: Stone Arrangement
description: Arrange 5 stones in a pattern that reflects your current state of mind. Leave it for the next wanderer.

title: Temperature of the Stream
description: Rest your hand in the water for 30 seconds. Notice the exact moment your skin stops registering cold.

title: Bark Reading
description: Close your eyes and trace the bark of three different trees. Describe each one in a single word.

title: Grounding
description: If conditions allow, stand barefoot in the grass for two minutes. Notice where your weight settles.

title: Peak Breathing
description: At the highest point you can safely reach, take 10 slow breaths. Count each one.

title: One True Sentence
description: Write a single sentence about this place. Rewrite it until it says exactly what you mean.

title: Name This Place
description: This spot has no name on any map. Give it one, and write down why.

title: Edge Awareness
description: From a safe distance, observe the cliff edge. Write what the boundary between solid and air makes you feel.

title: The Threshold
description: Stand at the cave entrance without entering. Write three words for what lies ahead and three for what lies behind.

title: Cloud Drift
description: Lie back in the meadow and follow one cloud until it changes shape completely.

title: Distance Listening
description: In the open field, record 60 seconds facing each cardinal direction. Which way carries the most sound?
